task_description: Make the CareVista app fully mobile-responsive with comprehensive CSS media queries, 44px tap targets, responsive inline grids via CSS attribute selectors, mobile-friendly Login page, and responsive dashboard layouts

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation and Vite build succeed cleanly. No test suite exists in this project. Post-review fix added .no-mobile-collapse opt-out class to prevent calendar and data-table grids from incorrectly collapsing on mobile. All 4 commits verified building successfully.
